confidence.HARD: filed / directly observed (reviews, dates, prices, Nordic accounts)
confidence.EST: modelled estimate (units, revenue) - shown as a band, never a point
confidence.ANEC: someone said it out loud (dev tweets, interviews, postmortems)

tiers.1-Direct: small-scope mining/dig loop - the core comparable set
tiers.3-Reference: big / multiplayer - ceiling markers, not typical-case
tiers.X-Drop?: survival-craft cluster - different genre, labelled not deleted

meta.launch_curve_note: Cumulative REVIEWS (a HARD proxy for sales velocity), week 0 = launch. Only games with a full review history appear; million-review giants are excluded because their launch weeks are unrecoverable from the reviews API.
meta.est_note: Units & revenue are ESTIMATES, never sales data. Revenue is GROSS (Valve takes 30%+).

years.note: Filed (PRH). Op margin ~74%; equity ratio ~100%. Rev -14.2% YoY. employees_avg filed 0 (founders on dividends; effective ~3).
Filed (PRH). Op margin ~74.2%; equity ratio ~98%. Rev +25.5% YoY. net_profit not in snippet - pull full filing.
Filed (Bolagsverket). Rev +102.9% YoY; net margin ~66%; total assets 86.5M SEK; soliditet ~87%. operating_profit not isolated (result-after-fin 50.7M).
Filed (PRH). LOSS-making; op margin -40.7%; equity ratio 0.6%. Rev -36.6% YoY.
Filed (PRH). Op margin ~-25.7%; NEGATIVE equity (~-17%). Rev +16.5% YoY. net not isolated. Headcount 21->15.
ABBREVIATED German filing (small GmbH): balance sheet only, no P&L. Balance total ~EUR1.0M. Revenue/profit legally not disclosed.
ABBREVIATED German filing (small GmbH): no public P&L. Revenue/profit not disclosed. Enshrouded-era figures would be FY2024+.
Jagex-announced. Record GBP110.9M; 5th consecutive growth year. Revenue only (profit not in release).
Jagex-announced. GBP120M; 6th successive growth year (~+10.5% on 2019); Covid tailwind.
Jagex-announced. GBP124.86M; 7th growth year (+4%); RuneScape 20th anniv; 1.2M members (~$169M). FY2022-24 accounts at Companies House 03982706 - manual PDF pull needed (no longer press-released).
Filed. 'Resultat' 125,384 kSEK (label pre-tax/net ambiguous). Rev -63.4% from FY2021 peak. Broken fiscal year - verify period_end.
Filed. THE Valheim spike year: rev 533.5M SEK (+212.7%); result-after-fin 511.9M (pre-tax); tax 105.4M -> net ~406.5M. ~46M SEK profit/employee.
Filed. Rev crashed to 94.0M SEK (-82.4%) - Valheim revenue is lumpy (spikes on major free updates). 'Resultat' 54,529 kSEK.
Filed. Rev 83.8M SEK (-10.9%); net 38.4M; vinstmarginal 60.6%. Note founded 2019-04-24 per Bolagsverket (Svensson began the game as a 2018 hobby).
Filed (CVR). Revenue not disclosed; gross profit 23,778 kDKK; net_profit shown is resultat foer skat (PRE-TAX) 12,272 kDKK.
Filed (CVR). REVENUE NOT DISCLOSED (Danish sec.32 gross-profit aggregation). Bruttofortjeneste (gross profit) 110,584 kDKK; afkastningsgrad 57%. NOT comparable to Swedish/Finnish revenue lines.
Company-reported (justice.cz filing, via press). Rev 1.4bn CZK (+34%); operating 951M; net 428M. 4.85M copies sold, 17M players.
PRELIMINARY/UNAUDITED (audited results H2-2026). Rev 1.7bn CZK (+23.6%); operating 1,231M; net 792M. Record year. Arma Reforger + DayZ Frostline drivers.
Filed (KRS). Loss-making (in dev). Share capital ~201,400 PLN.
Filed (KRS). Rev +38.8%; net loss -1.53M PLN.
Filed (KRS). Rev +106.7% to 4.31M PLN (Forever Skies EA); EBIT -1.2M; pre-tax -1.36M; net -1.41M. Very close to the user's own studio profile.
Filed (ONRC). Rev 2.35M RON (+6.95%); net 259,943 RON; pre-tax 329,176 RON; 10 emp. Modestly profitable. Earlier years available via termene.ro.

rounds.investors: Korpun Siemen Oy, Nordic Option Oy, private investors
rounds.note: EUR1.5M round; existing + private. Stage unlabelled. round_date ~2023 - verify. ~$623k total prior (PitchBook).
$10M to build Enshrouded. Stage unlabelled (Series-A-like). Tencent = minority investor, not parent.
German government grant for next game 'Game38'. Amount/date not disclosed.
Moonlighter Kickstarter final $134,267, <1 week (2016). Crowdfunding, not equity.

rounds.investors: Spanish Ministry of Culture and Sport
rounds.note: Public grant supporting Moonlighter dev. Amount/year not disclosed.
Outer Wilds Fig campaign (Aug 2015): rewards $126,480; equity ~$50k accepted (capped by Mobius, more offered). Some cite ~$1.2M incl. equity. Later bought out by Annapurna.
7DTD Kickstarter (Aug 2013): >$500k (~$507k), goal $200k. No institutional financing until Behaviour acquisition.
Pre-dev investment from Alt Ventures' NZ games fund. Amount/date not disclosed. Stage inferred.
NZ govt-backed CODE grant NZ$150,000 (June 2022) for Abiotic Factor.
Cap Nova seed 2016 + follow-on Feb 2017 (~$74k early, Tracxn).
ACQUISITION of remaining 70% (Coffee Stain already held 30%). Founders received 528M DKK. Full buyout -> subsidiary.
Coffee Stain holds a MINORITY stake + rev-share (not full acquisition; studio stays independent/Active). Amount/%/date undisclosed.
Tencent MINORITY stake (Feb 2021, undisclosed). Founder-controlled via SPM. Strategic minority, not a priced VC round.
Tencent minority ~45% (Hall retains majority). round_date ~2015-2016 - verify. Strategic minority.
Black The Fall Kickstarter (Sep 30-Oct 31 2014): GBP28,485 from 1,669 backers (goal GBP25,000). Via Square Enix Collective; studio also used a gaming accelerator.
Dome Keeper publishing deal (~2022). Advances typically recoupable, not equity. Amount undisclosed.
ACQUISITION by Devolver: up to $40M ($22M initial). Astroneer ~$87M lifetime rev cited.
ACQUISITION from Carlyle. Reported ~GBP910M (figures vary; ~GBP584M consideration cited elsewhere - verify). Jan-2021 valuation $530M.

S001.title: Bippinbits GmbH - Handelsregister Dresden HRB 39892
S001.notes: German company registry (North Data mirrors the official Handelsregister). HRB 39892; founded 2020; share capital EUR25,000; sole owner/MD Rene Habermann. No dedicated registry value in Lists -> tagged 'Other'.

S002.title: Bippinbits GmbH - Jahresabschluss (Bundesanzeiger)
S002.notes: Small GmbH files ABBREVIATED accounts (balance sheet only, no P&L). FY2023 filed 2024-06-24, FY2024 ~Oct 2025. Balance-sheet total ~EUR1.0M (aggregator OCR). Revenue/profit not publicly disclosed.

S003.title: Bippinbits GmbH - CAGGTUS exhibitor profile (headcount)
S003.author: Bippinbits GmbH
S003.notes: Studio self-report: started 2-person, 'now 7 with freelancers'. Approximate; verify current headcount on LinkedIn.

S004.title: Dome Keeper grossed ~$1M at launch; Raw Fury publishing
S004.notes: ANEC (games table): Raw Fury CEO stated ~$1M gross soon after Oct-2022 launch. MUST be archived (fragile). Publisher = Raw Fury.

S005.title: Image & Form International AB - Wikipedia
S005.notes: Founded 1997 Gothenburg by Brjann Sigurgeirsson; integrated into Thunderful Development AB (2020); Gothenburg team rebranded Stormteller Games after 2024 layoffs (~25 devs remain).

S006.title: Thunderful Group AB - Wikipedia (Atari acquisition)
S006.notes: Parent Thunderful Group AB (Nasdaq First North, delisted); acquired by Atari SA Aug 2025. Group ~510 employees (2023). Studio-level financials muddied by listed-group structure -> use group consolidated reports OR Image&Form AB filings (allabolag).

S007.title: Pugstorm - KYORA press kit (Chucklefish)
S007.notes: Founded 2018 Linkoping by Fredrik Prantare & Julian Seifert-Olszewski; ~35 full-time+contract; remote-first. Core Keeper 2M+ copies.

S008.title: Pugstorm AB - allabolag / ratsit (org.nr 559175-3602)
S008.notes: Swedish filed accounts mirror. Org.nr 559175-3602; share capital 50,000 SEK; FY2024 revenue 76.3M SEK, net 30.2M SEK, total assets 86.5M SEK, ~12 employees. Authoritative source = Bolagsverket filing.

S009.title: Nolla Games - studio site (founders)
S009.notes: Founders Petri Purho, Olli Harjola, Arvi 'Hempuli' Teikari. Helsinki. Small team.

S010.title: Nolla Games Oy - Finder/Asiakastieto/proff (Y-tunnus 2789347-8)
S010.notes: Finnish filed accounts (PRH). Y-tunnus 2789347-8; reg 2016-11-07. FY2023 revenue EUR3.37M / op EUR2.5M / net EUR1.97M; FY2024 revenue EUR4.2M / op EUR3.1M; equity ratio ~98-100%. Employees filed as 0 (founders on dividends); effective ~3.

S011.title: VRKiwi Oy - proff/asiakastieto (Y-tunnus 2602442-2)
S011.notes: Finnish filed accounts. VRKiwi Oy (formerly/aka MeKiwi Oy), Y-tunnus 2602442-2, reg 2014-02-18, Oulu. FY2023 revenue EUR0.6M / net -EUR0.31M / 21 emp; FY2024 revenue EUR0.699M / op loss ~-EUR0.2M / 15 emp / negative equity.

S012.title: VRKiwi - EUR1.5M funding round + Business Finland (LinkedIn)
S012.notes: ANEC: closed EUR1.5M round; existing investors Korpun Siemen Oy & Nordic Option Oy + private. Prior backers incl. Business Finland, AJK Capital, Kinoni, Zenvest (PitchBook total ~$623k pre-round). Archive recommended.

S013.title: VRKiwi - PitchBook profile (funding/investors)
S013.notes: ~$623K raised; investors AJK Capital, Business Finland, Kinoni, Zenvest, Korpun Siemen (5 of 7). ~13 employees.

S014.title: Iron Gate - about page
S014.notes: Skovde, Sweden; founded 2018 (site) by Richard Svensson & Henrik Tornqvist (ex-Pieces Interactive); team of 16. Valheim 12M+ copies. NB secondary sources say founded April 2019 - verify via Bolagsverket.

S015.title: Iron Gate AB - Dealroom (publisher/ownership)
S015.notes: Publisher Coffee Stain (Embracer) holds a MINORITY stake + rev-share; Iron Gate otherwise independent.

S016.title: Embracer acquires Tuxedo Labs (Embracer PR)
S016.notes: Malmo, Sweden; founded 2019 by Dennis Gustafsson (CTO); team of 6. Acquired 100% by Embracer via Saber Interactive, completed 2022-07-01 (upfront + earn-out, terms undisclosed). Teardown 1M+ copies.

S017.title: Ghost Ship Games ApS - Wikipedia
S017.notes: Copenhagen; founded spring 2016 by ~6 veterans (ex-Press Play). Coffee Stain took 30%, then Embracer/Coffee Stain acquired remaining 70% Aug 2021 (founders received 528M DKK). DRG 8M+ copies. Also runs Ghost Ship Publishing.

S018.title: Ghost Ship Games - Tracxn (funding/headcount)
S018.notes: Cap Nova (Danish govt games fund) seed 2016 + seed Feb 2017 (~$74k early). ~27-32 emp (2022-23); ~60 by 2026 (LeadIQ). Danish CVR accounts available (proff.dk) - not yet pulled.

S019.title: Foulball Hangover - press/about
S019.notes: Foulball Hangover LTD, UK; solo dev Max Hayon, grew to 5 FT. Hydroneer self-published, 1M+ copies. Founded year approximate (~2019) - verify via UK Companies House.

S020.title: Fire Hose Games - site/press kit
S020.notes: Boston MA; founded 2008 by MIT alumni; fully remote. Techtonica self-published (2023). US private - no public financials. Headcount ~15-25 (verify).

S021.title: Digital Sun - about page
S021.notes: Valencia, Spain; team since 2013, co. founded 2014 (Javier Gimenez, Ruben Pico); 50+ staff. Moonlighter 2.5M+ (published by 11 bit studios); Cataclismo self-published.

S022.title: Digital Sun / Moonlighter funding (Gamespain)
S022.notes: Moonlighter Kickstarter funded $134,267 in <1 week (2016) via Square Enix Collective; activity also funded by Spanish Ministry of Culture and Sport (grant). Archive recommended.

S023.title: Devolver acquires System Era Softworks (Investegate/Devolver PR)
S023.notes: Seattle WA; founded 2014 (Bromell, Wilson, Pepera, Liechty); 50 employees. Acquired by Devolver up to $40M ($22M initial). Astroneer owns 100% IP, ~$87M lifetime revenue (ANEC).

S024.title: HopFrog / Forager - Wikipedia + Forbes
S024.notes: HopFrog S.A., Sunchales, Santa Fe, Argentina; solo founder Mariano Cavallero (+contractors). Forager (2019) published by Humble Bundle; 900k units / ~$10M gross (Forbes, ANEC). Founder now based in Bellevue WA. Founded ~2016-17.

S025.title: Re-Logic / Terraria - Wikipedia
S025.notes: Floyds Knobs, Indiana; founded 2011 by Andrew 'Redigit' Spinks; ~11 devs. Terraria self-published, 60.7M+ units by Oct 2024 (ANEC). US private - no public financials.

S026.title: Mobius Digital / Outer Wilds - Wikipedia
S026.notes: Los Angeles (DTLA); founded 2013 by Loan Verneau & Masi Oka. Outer Wilds (2019) published by Annapurna Interactive; funded via Fig crowdfunding (investors got 245% return) before Annapurna bought out the Fig stake.

S027.title: Keen Games GmbH - North Data (HRB 98321)
S027.notes: Frankfurt; Keen Games GmbH, HRB 98321, share capital EUR25,000, MD Jan Jockel. Founded ~2004 (EST - verify via HRB). Small GmbH -> abbreviated Bundesanzeiger filings.

S028.title: Keen Games - $10M round (Hiro Capital + Tencent) / headcount
S028.notes: $10M round 2021-07-20 from Hiro Capital + Tencent (for Enshrouded, Portal Knights spiritual successor). Also German Government grant for next game 'Game38'. ~63 employees (2026). Enshrouded self-published (first self-pub); Portal Knights via 505 Games.

S029.title: Obsidian Entertainment - Wikipedia + PitchBook
S029.notes: Irvine CA; founded 2003 (Urquhart, Avellone, Parker, Monahan, Jones). Acquired by Microsoft/Xbox Game Studios (announced Nov 2018). ~310 employees (2025). Grounded published by Xbox Game Studios. NB a '$160.5M Series C' online belongs to a same-named biotech, NOT this studio.

S030.title: Far From Home - about/press
S030.notes: Far From Home S.A., Wroclaw, Poland; founded April 2020 by ex-Techland/etc veterans; ~20-23 staff. Forever Skies self-published (Sony partnership for PS5).

S031.title: HypeTrain Digital / Voidtrain - Glitchwave + Steam
S031.notes: Voidtrain dev 'Nearly' is tightly tied to publisher HypeTrain Digital (Cyprus-based, founded 2015; Steam lists HypeTrain as dev+publisher). Studio detail (team, exact entity, self-pub) uncertain - FLAG for review. X-Drop candidate.

S032.title: The Fun Pimps - about + Behaviour acquisition (InvestGame)
S032.notes: Allen, Texas; founded late 2012 (Richard & Joel Huenink, Christian Lang); grew to ~70 via 7DTD revenue (Kickstarter 2013, no institutional financing). Acquired by Behaviour Interactive (Canada) ~2026. 7DTD revenue $9M(2014)->$72M(2023)->$32M(2025) (analyst est, ANEC).

S033.title: Deep Field Games / Abiotic Factor - Wikipedia + site
S033.notes: New Zealand-based; founder Geoff 'Zag' Keene; ~10 devs. Abiotic Factor published by Playstack (UK); Unfortunate Spacemen (2016) self-published. Funding: Alt Ventures 'Kiwi gaming fund' + NZ govt CODE grant NZ$150,000 (June 2022).

S034.title: Jagex Limited - Wikipedia + CVC/Haveli PR
S034.notes: Cambridge UK; Jagex Limited incorporated 2000 (founders Andrew & Paul Gower); 700+ staff. Owned by CVC Capital Partners + Haveli Investments since Feb 2024 (from Carlyle, ~GBP910M). RuneScape:Dragonwilds self-published. As a LARGE UK co, files FULL Companies House accounts (real financials available - not yet pulled).

S035.title: SurrounDead - solo dev Zurvivor (Synty blog + press)
S035.notes: Solo dev under pseudonym 'Zurvivor' (also seen 'Zuraxii'), self-publishing under studio name 'SurrounDead'/PlaySurrounDead. Dev began late 2020, EA Jun 2022. Country UNDISCLOSED (one Moroccan outlet framed it locally but did not confirm nationality) - FLAG. Proposed slug: surroundead (replaces placeholder 'verify').

S036.title: Bohemia Interactive a.s. - Wikipedia + About
S036.notes: Prague, Czechia; Bohemia Interactive a.s., founded May 1999 (Marek Spanel, Ondrej Spanel, Slavomir Pavlicek); ~500 staff (offices in CZ/Thailand/NL). Tencent minority stake Feb 2021 (undisclosed); founder-controlled via SPM. DayZ self-published. NB 'BISim' (military sim, acquired by BAE 2024) is a SEPARATE entity. Czech register filings available (justice.cz).

S037.title: RocketWerkz - Wikipedia + The Spinoff
S037.notes: Auckland NZ (orig. Dunedin); founded Dec 2014 by Dean Hall (DayZ creator); ~65-75 staff. Tencent minority ~45%, Hall majority-owned. Icarus (2021) & Stationeers self-published. NZ private - limited public financials.

S038.title: Sand Sailor Studio - site + RGDA
S038.notes: Bucharest, Romania; founded 2014 (Creative Director Cristian Diaconescu); ~9-10 staff. Black The Fall (2017) published by Square Enix Collective (Kickstarter + accelerator); Bossgard self-published; ASKA (2024) publisher to verify (possibly Thunderful). Romanian ONRC filings available.

S039.title: Jagex Limited - CBInsights + Companies House (03982706)
S039.notes: FY2021 revenue $168.95M (from filed accounts, USD-converted); Jan-2021 valuation $530M. Full FY2024 statutory accounts (year-end 31-Dec-2024, filed 4-Jun-2025) available FREE at Companies House 03982706 for exact GBP figures - not yet extracted.

S040.title: Iron Gate AB - SYNA/Bolagsfakta/hitta/Skaraborgs Nyheter (559203-4820)
S040.notes: Swedish filed accounts (Bolagsverket, via aggregators). Org.nr 559203-4820, reg 2019-04-24 (SETTLES founded=2019). Multi-year revenue (kSEK): FY2022 170,584 / FY2023 533,487 / FY2024 94,026 / FY2025 83,775. ~60% net margins. NB Iron Gate uses a BROKEN (non-calendar) fiscal year - year labels follow aggregator convention; exact period_end/operating-vs-net splits need the filing PDF.

S041.title: Ghost Ship Games ApS - proff.dk / krak.dk (CVR 37989819)
S041.notes: Danish filed accounts (CVR). CVR 37989819, reg 2016-09-01, share capital 80,000 DKK. IMPORTANT: Danish small/mid cos aggregate revenue into 'bruttofortjeneste' (gross profit) under section 32 - REVENUE IS NOT SEPARATELY DISCLOSED. FY2025 gross profit 110,584 kDKK, 52 emp, afkastningsgrad 57%; FY2019 gross profit 23,778 kDKK, pre-tax profit 12,272 kDKK.

S042.title: Bohemia Interactive a.s. - CzechCrunch/Forbes/Tiscali (ICO 27218864)
S042.notes: Company-reported P&L (Czech register justice.cz, reported via press). ICO 27218864. FY2024 revenue 1.4bn CZK (+34%), operating 951M, net 428M. FY2025 (PRELIMINARY/unaudited) revenue 1.7bn CZK (+23.6%), operating 1,231M, net 792M. 4.85M copies, 17-21M players. Confirms Tencent minority (2021) + SPM ownership.

S043.title: Digital Sun - Iberinform / eInforma / Empresia (CIF B98768575)
S043.notes: ENTITY SPLIT: original 'Digital Sun Games SL' (CIF B98768575, constituted 2015-10-01, share capital EUR62,825) is now largely INACTIVE - last accounts deposit FY2020, facturacion EUR60-120k. Live operating entity appears to be separate 'Digital Sun Studios SL' (CIF B98516321), whose figures are PAYWALLED. Spanish accounts are not freely accessible like Nordic ones - current revenue could not be pulled free.

S044.title: Far From Home S.A. - BizRaport / rejestr.io (KRS 0000845096)
S044.notes: Polish filed accounts (KRS Repozytorium Dokumentow Finansowych). KRS 0000845096, NIP 6751729147, reg 2020-06-08, share capital ~201,400 PLN. LOSS-MAKING (in dev pre-Forever-Skies-1.0). Revenue (PLN): FY2021 1,502,070 / FY2022 2,085,098 / FY2023 4,309,772. Net loss (PLN): FY2021 -951,571 / FY2022 -1,525,510 / FY2023 -1,412,965. Very close profile to the user's own studio.

S045.title: Sand Sailor Studio SRL - termene.ro / listafirme (CUI 33244826)
S045.notes: Romanian filed accounts (ONRC). CUI 33244826, J40/6672/2014, reg 2014-06-05, Bucharest Sector 2. FY2024 revenue 2,351,976 RON (+6.95%), net profit 259,943 RON, pre-tax 329,176 RON, 10 employees. Modestly profitable. Earlier years available via termene.ro.

S046.title: Fig / Outer Wilds crowdfunding - Grokipedia / Digital Trends
S046.notes: Outer Wilds was Fig's debut campaign (Aug 2015), goal $125-150k. Rewards raised $126,480; equity portion ~$50k accepted (Mobius capped it; more was offered). Some sources cite ~$1.2M including equity. Later bought out by Annapurna.

S047.title: 7 Days to Die Kickstarter - Kicktraq / Kickstarter
S047.notes: 7DTD Kickstarter (Aug 2013) goal $200k, funded to OVER $500,000 (~$507k) via multiple stretch goals. Public Kickstarter final. No institutional financing afterward until Behaviour acquisition (~2026).

S048.title: Jagex GBP annual results 2019-2021 (Jagex PR / mmobomb / 80.lv)
S048.author: Anthony Jones
S048.notes: Jagex-announced native-GBP revenue: FY2019 GBP110.9M (5th growth yr); FY2020 GBP120M (6th yr, Covid); FY2021 GBP124.86M (7th yr, +4%, RuneScape 20th anniv, 1.2M members). Jagex STOPPED press-releasing revenue after FY2021 (PE-owned from 2024). FY2022-2024 full accounts filed at Companies House 03982706 (bot-blocked to automated fetch; manual PDF download works). RuneScape passed $2B lifetime revenue (Mar 2025).

S049.title: Black The Fall Kickstarter - Kickstarter / Kicktraq
S049.notes: Black The Fall raised GBP28,485 from 1,669 backers (goal GBP25,000 / ~$40k), campaign Sep 30-Oct 31 2014, via Square Enix Collective. Public Kickstarter final = HARD. Game released Jul 2017.

S050.title: Gamalytic - competitor game stats export (copies sold & gross revenue estimates)
S050.notes: Third-party model ESTIMATE, not sales data. One point per game = est_units_mid / est_revenue_gross_mid in estimates.csv. Revenue is GROSS. Wishlist counts paywalled (export gave a boolean only).
